description: Health Canada approved ivosidenib in combination with azacitidine is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with newly diagnosed acute myeloid leukemia (AML) with an isocitrate dehydrogenase-1 (IDH1) R132 mutation who are not eligible to receive intensive induction chemotherapy.
